headline: Fortinet Wins 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Workload Security
summary: Award recognizes Fortinet’s ability to help organizations secure cloud workloads with FortiCNAPP, delivering unified visibility, risk prioritization, and protection across cloud environmentsSUNNYVALE, Calif., April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Fortinet® (NASDAQ: FTNT), the global cybersecurity leader driving the convergence of networking and security, today announced it has received the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Workload Security.
